claim_boundary: Diagnostic/smoke evidence that forecast variants are consumed by PredictionPlannerAdapter and produce forecast-brake replay closed-loop metrics. Not benchmark evidence; does not claim any forecast variant improves safety, success, or runtime.

commands.consumer_smoke: scripts/dev/run_worktree_shared_venv.sh -- uv run python scripts/validation/validate_forecast_planner_consumer.py --output-dir <ignored-local-output-dir>/consumer_smoke --variants none cv semantic interaction_aware risk_filtered

consumer_smoke.local_output: consumer smoke JSON/Markdown were generated under ignored worktree-local output; rerun the recorded command to reproduce them

live_replay.local_output: live replay JSON/Markdown were generated under ignored worktree-local output; rerun the recorded command to reproduce them

scenario_selection_note: Current validation scripts only support one deterministic consumer fixture and one live trace fixture. A 3-scenario map benchmark is not available without additional trace fixtures or a scenario-specific map-runner config.

live_replay_full_matrix.classification_reason: cv forecast produces closed-loop metrics that differ from the integrated no-forecast baseline

same_seed_caveats: Consumer smoke uses a single deterministic SocNav observation with seed 2960 across all variants.
Live replay uses a single trace (dense_pedestrian_stress seed 2765) across all variants.
Neither fixture provides scenario diversity; results are fixture-specific, not statistically powered.

degraded_or_fallback_rows.reason: Predicted futures match the no-forecast constant-velocity baseline in this fixture.
No semantic metadata available in the fixture; predictions default to constant-velocity.
Risk filtering widens uncertainty only; mean futures match baseline.
Forecast-brake replay policy stops unconditionally; 20 false-positive stops, 0 progress.
Identical to cv: forecast-brake replay stops unconditionally.
Identical to cv: forecast-brake replay stops unconditionally.
Identical to cv: forecast-brake replay stops unconditionally.

map_runner_slice_decision: STOP. All non-none live-replay variants produce identical degraded closed-loop metrics (20 false-positive stops, 0.0 progress). Consumer smoke confirms cv/semantic/risk_filtered predictions match baseline. A 3-scenario map-runner slice with allow_fallback=false would not produce new evidence.

execution_modes.note: All variants built BaselineProbabilisticPredictor and fed forecasts into the planner scoring path. Degradation is semantic (predictions match baseline or replay policy is uniformly conservative), not a missing-component fallback.

limitations: Single deterministic SocNav observation for consumer smoke; not statistically powered.
Single trace fixture for live replay; not scenario-diverse.
Forecast-brake replay policy is a minimal brake heuristic, not a production planner.
No 3-scenario map benchmark available; current scripts only support one consumer fixture and one trace.
All non-none live-replay variants produce identical closed-loop metrics due to uniform forecast-brake behavior.
Results are diagnostic/smoke, not benchmark or paper-facing evidence.

artifacts.raw_outputs: ignored worktree-local validation outputs only; rerun the recorded commands to reproduce

next_recommended_step: Follow-up issue #3146 tracks the next proof surface: create motion-rich trace fixtures for at least 3 scenario families (e.g., crossing, bottleneck, corridor) with forecast-affecting pedestrian dynamics, then rerun the live replay full matrix. The current forecast-brake replay policy may need tuning to avoid uniform false-positive stopping before scenario-diverse evidence is meaningful.
